title: Cancrinia tadshikorum
taxonomy: Cancrinia tadshikorum is a species of plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is native to Tajikistan. The classification of Cancrinia tadshikorum includes its kingdom as Plantae and its phylum as Magnoliophyta. Further classification places it in the class Magnoliopsida and the order Brassicales. Additionally, the genus Cancrinia is a small genus of plants within the Brassicaceae family.
